source_title: Energy management of smart homes over fog-based IoT architecture
article_summary: The article presents a smart-home energy management approach based on a Markov-chain prediction model and a novel algorithm that uses those predictions to reduce consumption while maintaining human comfort. It also describes a fog-based IoT architecture deployed in a real smart home to support practical energy-aware automation. This makes it relevant for greener trigger-action rules that rely on predicted user activity, comfort-preserving control, and energy-saving scheduling.
